options.name: --help
options.description: show this message and exit

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
map an XML namespace to a C# namespace
Separate XML namespace and C# namespace by '='.
A single value (no '=') is taken as the C#
namespace the empty XML namespace is mapped to.
One option must be given for each namespace to
be mapped.
A file name may be given by appending a pipe
sign (|) followed by a file name (like schema.
xsd) to the XML namespace.
If no mapping is found for an XML namespace, a
name is generated automatically (may fail).

options.name: --namespaceFile
options.description:
file containing mappings from XML namespaces to C#
namespaces
The line format is one mapping per line: XML
namespace = C# namespace [optional file name].
Lines starting with # and empty lines are
ignored.

options.name: --typeNameSubstitute
options.description:
substitute a generated type/member name
Separate type/member name and substitute name by
'='.
Prefix type/member name with an appropriate kind
ID as documented at: https://t.ly/HHEI.
Prefix with 'A:' to substitute any type/member.

options.name: --typeNameSubstituteFile
options.description:
file containing generated type/member name
substitute mappings
The line format is one mapping per line:
prefixed type/member name = substitute name.

options.name: --output
options.description: the FOLDER to write the resulting .cs files to

options.name: --datetime-offset
options.description:
map xs:datetime and derived types to System.
DateTimeOffset instead of System.DateTime

options.name: --dateOnly
options.description:
map xs:date to System.DateOnly and xs:time to
System.TimeOnly

options.name: --integer
options.description:
map xs:integer and derived types to TYPE instead
of automatic approximation
TYPE can be sb[yte], sh[ort], i[nt], l[ong], ni[
nt], b[yte], us[hort], ui[nt], ul[ong], nui[nt],
or d[ecimal]

options.name: --use-integer-type-as-fallback
options.description:
use integer type specified via -i only if no type
can be deduced

options.name: --enable-data-binding
options.description: enable INotifyPropertyChanged data binding

options.name: --order
options.description:
emit order for all class members stored as XML
element

options.name: --pcl
options.description: PCL compatible output

options.name: --prefix
options.description:
the PREFIX to prepend to auto-generated namespace
names

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print generated file names on stdout

options.name: --nullable
options.description:
generate nullable adapter properties for optional
elements/attributes w/o default values

options.name: --ef
options.description:
generate Entity Framework Code First compatible
classes

options.name: --interface
options.description:
generate interfaces for groups and attribute
groups (default is enabled)

options.name: --pascal
options.description:
use Pascal case for class and property names (
default is enabled)

options.name: --assemblyVisible
options.description:
use the internal visibility modifier (default is
false)

options.name: --enableUpaCheck
options.description:
should XmlSchemaSet check for Unique Particle
Attribution (UPA) (default is enabled)

options.name: --collectionType
options.description:
collection type to use (default is System.
Collections.ObjectModel.Collection`1)

options.name: --collectionImplementationType
options.description:
the default collection type implementation to use (
default is null)

options.name: --PublicWithoutConstructorInitialization
options.description:
generate a private, public, or init-only setter
with or without backing field initialization for
collections
(default is Private; can be: Private, Public,
PublicWithoutConstructorInitialization, Init,
InitWithoutConstructorInitialization)

options.name: --codeTypeReferenceOptions
options.description:
the default CodeTypeReferenceOptions Flags to use (
default is unset; can be: GlobalReference,
GenericTypeParameter)

options.name: --textValuePropertyName
options.description:
the name of the property that holds the text value
of an element (default is Value)

options.name: --debuggerStepThrough
options.description:
generate DebuggerStepThroughAttribute (default is
enabled)

options.name: --disableComments
options.description: do not include comments from xsd

options.name: --noUnderscore
options.description:
do not generate underscore in private member name (
default is false)

options.name: --description
options.description: generate DescriptionAttribute (default is true)

options.name: --complexTypesForCollections
options.description:
generate complex types for collections (default is
true)

options.name: --useShouldSerialize
options.description:
use ShouldSerialize pattern instead of Specified
pattern (default is false)

options.name: --separateFiles
options.description:
generate a separate file for each class (default
is false)

options.name: --namespaceHierarchy
options.description:
generate a separate folder for namespace hierarchy.
Implies "separateFiles" if true (default is

options.name: --separateSubstitutes
options.description:
generate a separate property for each element of a
substitution group (default is false)

options.name: --doNotForceIsNullable
options.description:
do not force generator to emit IsNullable = true
in XmlElement annotation for nillable elements
when element is nullable (minOccurs < 1 or
parent element is choice) (default is false)

options.name: --compactTypeNames
options.description:
use type names without namespace qualifier for
types in the using list (default is false)

options.name: --commentLanguages
options.description:
comment languages to use (default is en; supported
are en, de)

options.name: --uniqueTypeNames
options.description:
generate type names that are unique across
namespaces (default is false)

options.name: --generatedCodeAttribute
options.description:
add version information to GeneratedCodeAttribute (
default is true)

options.name: --netCore
options.description:
generate .NET Core specific code that might not
work with .NET Framework (default is false)

options.name: --nullableReferenceAttributes
options.description: generate attributes for nullable reference types (

options.name: --useArrayItemAttribute
options.description:
use ArrayItemAttribute for sequences with single
elements (default is true)

options.name: --enumAsString
options.description: Use string instead of enum for enumeration

options.name: --disableMergeRestrictionsWithBase
options.description:
Disable merging of simple type restrictions with
base type restrictions

options.name: --commandArgs
options.description:
generate a comment with the exact command line
arguments that were used to generate the source
code (default is true)

options.name: --unionCommonType
options.description: generate a common type for unions if possible (

options.name: --serializeEmptyCollections
options.description:
serialize empty collections (default is false)
--dtd, --allowDtdParse allows dtd parse (default is false)

options.name: --omitXmlIncludeAttribute
options.description:
omit generation of XmlIncludeAttribute for derived
types (default is false)

options.name: --enumCollection
options.description:
generate typed enum collections for xs:list types
instead of string collections (default is false)

options.name: --namingScheme
options.description:
use the specified naming scheme for class and
property names (default is Pascal; can be:
Direct, Pascal, Legacy)

options.name: --forceUriScheme
--emitMetadataAttributes
options.description: emit metadata helper attributes (default is false)

options.name: --metadataNamespace
options.description:
namespace for generated metadata helper attributes
(default is XmlSchemaClassGenerator.Metadata)
